task.objective: Post-bootstrap milestone 4 (first slice): generation modes phyllotaxy, proportional and bifurcation per 07_EVALUATION_ENGINE.md, with mode-driven deterministic azimuths and per-parent placement (counts follow actual parent length). Viewport milestone deferred by ADR-0005 pending Qt/wgpu-native dependency intake. Also: showcase pipeline moved into the repo (tools/showcase/) with reference renders versioned in samples/renders/ per supervisor request, plus RiverBirch (bifurcation), phyllotaxy AlpineFir rework, and NebulaSporeTree (alien art-direction stress test).

outputs: src/evaluation: phyllotaxy/proportional/bifurcation in make_placements; Placement.azimuth_deg with placement > property > stream precedence; per-parent placement computation
samples/renders/: versioned reference images for every species + grove + base study
samples/documents: RiverBirch, NebulaSporeTree; AlpineFir phyllotaxy rework
tests: phyllotaxy whorl count/azimuth determinism, proportional length scaling, bifurcation tip placement

validation.result: 100% tests passed (12 suites) on both presets

CoastalOak 466/104,417; AlpineFir 1,651/220,389 (f1f3e2f98a3588ea); WeepingWillow 134/65,669; IslandPalm 20/9,976; RiverBirch 369/43,164 (a094ae259f8eabca); NebulaSporeTree 96/27,190 (d961a20ea557d445); zero warnings

risks: Bifurcation subset: threshold/probability/asymmetry/depth controls from 07 not yet implemented; recursion is via chained generators
Phyllotaxy ordinals shift if generation.first changes (shared with interval mode; B-025 remapping work)
Reference renders are diagnostic flat-shaded images; they are eyeball baselines, not pixel-exact golden images yet
